title: WATCH:  Rescuers speak out after dramatic hot air balloon rescue
fullText: Rescuers speak out after dramatic hot air balloon rescue"GMA" shares details of the rescue more than 900 feet in the air and hears from the firefighters who saved two people trapped in the balloon.March 3, 2026
summary: "GMA" shares details of the rescue more than 900 feet in the air and hears from the firefighters who saved two people trapped in the balloon.
